title: Samuel Mamootil
tagline: Cloud & Platform Engineer — building infrastructure that lets teams ship faster and sleep better.
description: Samuel Mamootil is a Cloud and Platform Engineer specialising in AWS, Azure, GCP, Terraform, Kubernetes, and DevOps. Azure certified. MS student at UTA Arlington, TX. Available for Cloud, Platform Engineering, SRE, and AI Infrastructure roles.
author: Samuel Mamootil
heroHeadline: Cloud migrations shipped. Platforms standardised. Teams unblocked.
heroIntro: I build cloud infrastructure, DevOps pipelines, and AI-powered applications that remove friction at scale. Delivered across AWS, Azure, and GCP at IBM, Wipro, and LTIMindtree for clients including H&M, Siemens, Nokia, and Alight Solutions. Open to DevOps Engineering, Cloud Architecture, MLOps, and Platform Engineering roles in the US.
story: Samuel Mamootil is a DevOps Engineer, Cloud Architect, and Machine Learning Engineer based in Arlington, TX — building the infrastructure layer that lets engineering teams move fast without breaking things.

At IBM, I led multi-cloud modernisation for enterprise clients across AWS, Azure, and GCP — designing landing zones, building Helm-based Kubernetes platforms, and delivering CI/CD pipelines that teams actually use. At Wipro, I led a 7-engineer team building reusable Terraform modules and AWS data platform infrastructure for Alight Solutions.

At LTIMindtree, I migrated 100+ enterprise applications to Azure and deployed secure infrastructure for global clients including Parexel and Regeneron — earning two Best Team awards for delivery quality and client impact.

Right now I'm finishing my Master's at UTA, building ReRhythm (an AI career coach on AWS Bedrock that placed 2nd at the UTA Analytics Symposium), and actively looking for DevOps, Cloud Architecture, and ML Engineering roles in the US. My GitHub is github.com/samuelmamootil.
strengths: Multi-cloud delivery across AWS, Azure, and GCP
Platform standardisation with reusable Terraform modules
AI/ML infrastructure — SageMaker, Azure ML, Bedrock
Technical leadership and enterprise cloud migration programs

faq.a: Samuel Mamootil (also known as Samuel Raju Mamootil) is a Cloud and Platform Engineer based in Arlington, Texas. He specialises in AWS, Microsoft Azure, GCP, Terraform, Kubernetes, and DevOps. He holds three Microsoft Azure certifications and is completing a Master's degree at the University of Texas at Arlington.

faq.q: What does Samuel Mamootil specialise in?
faq.a: Samuel specialises in cloud platform engineering, DevOps, site reliability engineering, infrastructure as code (Terraform), Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and AI/ML infrastructure. He has delivered multi-cloud migrations and platform engineering programs for enterprise clients at IBM, Wipro, and LTIMindtree.

faq.q: What cloud platforms has Samuel Mamootil worked with?
faq.a: Samuel has hands-on experience across AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud Platform (GCP). He is Microsoft Azure certified at the Solutions Architect Expert, DevOps Engineer Expert, and Administrator Associate levels.

faq.q: What companies has Samuel Mamootil worked for?
faq.a: Samuel has worked at Wipro (Tech Lead), IBM (Junior Tech Lead), LTIMindtree (Software Engineer), and NeuroSpeech (Junior Developer). His enterprise clients have included H&M, Siemens, Nokia, Südzucker, Alight Solutions, Parexel, Regeneron, and Veolia Water.

faq.q: Is Samuel Mamootil available for cloud engineering roles in the US?
faq.a: Yes. Samuel Mamootil is actively seeking Cloud Engineering, Platform Engineering, Site Reliability Engineering (SRE), and AI Infrastructure roles in the United States. He is based in Arlington, TX.
Samuel Mamootil's GitHub profile is github.com/samuelmamootil. His portfolio website is samuelmamootil.github.io.

faq.q: Who is Samuel the cloud engineer?
faq.a: Samuel refers to Samuel Mamootil, a Cloud and Platform Engineer based in Arlington, TX. He specialises in AWS, Azure, GCP, Terraform, Kubernetes, and DevOps. His portfolio is at samuelmamootil.github.io.

faq.q: Where can I find Samuel Mamootil's portfolio?
faq.a: Samuel Mamootil's portfolio is at samuelmamootil.github.io. It includes cloud engineering case studies from IBM, Wipro, and LTIMindtree, plus projects, blog posts, and a resume.

faq.q: What awards has Samuel Mamootil received?
faq.a: Samuel Mamootil received Second Runner-Up at the UTA Analytics Symposium AWS competition for ReRhythm, an AI career coaching platform built on AWS Bedrock and ECS Fargate. He also received two LTIMindtree Best Team awards — Gold for the GenRE cloud migration program (100+ apps migrated to Azure) and Bronze for the Parexel Azure DevOps infrastructure project.

faq.q: Is Samuel Mamootil a DevOps Engineer or Cloud Architect?
faq.a: Samuel Mamootil works across DevOps engineering, cloud architecture, and machine learning engineering. He has hands-on experience with CI/CD pipelines, Terraform IaC, Kubernetes, AWS, Azure, GCP, and AI/ML infrastructure including AWS SageMaker and AWS Bedrock.

faq.q: What is Samuel Mamootil's GitHub username?
faq.a: Samuel Mamootil's GitHub username is samuelmamootil. His GitHub profile is at github.com/samuelmamootil and his portfolio is at samuelmamootil.github.io.
